title: How did the Angels know to attack Rei
display_title: How did the Angels know to attack Rei
wikitext:
[]: How did the Angels know to attack Rei?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat Aug 22, 2009 10:58 pm Rei always seems to be attacked by Angels. Do they know that she's basically Lillith, or what? I'd list the instances, but I'm cold and tired.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Aug 23, 2009 3:02 pm Remember that the reason they attack at all is to find Adam, their Mother, and a Seed of Life. Remember that when Kaworu found Lilith, it followed there by apparently sensing for her, thinking it Lilith, meaning the Angels can't tell Adam and Lilith apart. Remember that Rei in Unit 00 is basically a clone of a Seed of Life's body, with the soul of a Seed of Life. Cue Angels thinking, "Mommy? Mommy is that you?" and attempting to merge.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 23, 2009 4:40 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Remember that the reason they attack at all is to find Adam

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Aug 23, 2009 6:28 pm Reichu wrote: Except for when it isn't. (Even CI doesn't provide a single concise answer on this one...)

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Aug 23, 2009 11:22 pm Reichu wrote: AuraTwilight wrote: Remember that the reason they attack at all is to find Adam

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Aug 24, 2009 2:00 am AuraTwilight wrote: Remember that Rei in Unit 00 is basically a clone of a Seed of Life's body, with the soul of a Seed of Life.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Mon Aug 24, 2009 2:46 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: AuraTwilight wrote: Remember that Rei in Unit 00 is basically a clone of a Seed of Life's body, with the soul of a Seed of Life.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 24, 2009 4:47 am Legendary wrote: seed of knowledge

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Mon Aug 24, 2009 6:33 am Legendary wrote: seed of knowledge

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Aug 24, 2009 9:05 am it looks like everybody took as granted that Eva-00 gets attacked abnormally often. I call bs on that. Times 00 is attacked in series: Ramiel in ep 6 - invalid: Eva-00 blocked attack on Eva-01 anyway Matarael in ep 11 - invalid: Eva-00 and Eva-02 gets also atacked Sahaquiel in ep 12 - if you can call that "attack"...Anyway, invalid for above cited reasons Bardiel in ep 18 - invalid: Bardiel attacked all three Evas and first victim was Asuka, not Rei Zeruel in ep 19 - invalid: Zeruel attacked all evas and first victim was Asuka, again Armisael in ep 23 - invalid: it was only Eva to engage the angel. When Eva-01 came Armisael "attacked" (or did its thing, whatever the "thing" is) it too For comparison, let's presume Eva-01 or alternatively Eva-02 is abnormally prone for getting attacked Eva-01: Sachiel in ep1 - only Eva deployed, invalid Shamsel in ep 3 - only eva deployed, invalid Ramiel in ep 5 & 6 - in ep 5 only eva applied, invalid. In ep 6 the eva responsible for offense, thus invalid (Ramiel propably didn't even know about Eva-00) Israfel in ep 9 - attacked also Eva-02, invalid Matarael in ep 11 - again, it attacks all three evas. Invalid Sahaquel in ep 12 - again, that attack is against them all (though they more got into way than even being the actual targes) so invalid Leliel in ep 16 - invalid because Eva-01 is one who started the attack on Leliel Bardiel in ep 18 - attacked all evas Zeruel in ep 19 - attacked all evas Armisael - attacked Eva-00 too Kaworu/Eva-02 - genuine one on one match: also invalid because it was only non-possessed eva around and then Eva-02: Gaghiel in ep 8 - invalid as Eva-02 was only eva around and Gaghiel attacked due to Adam, not because Eva-02 was there Israfel in ep 9 - invalid, attacked Eva-01 too Sandalphon in ep 10 - invalid as Eva-02 was only eva engaged and was the hostile force against angel Matarael in ep 11 - once again, all three evas got attacked so invalid Sahaquiel in ep 12 - same Leliel in ep 16 - invalid, it first attacked Eva-01 and intentionality of Leliel's attack (it might've been completely defensive) on Evas is debatable Bardiel in ep 18 invalid, all three evas were attacked Zeruel in ep 19 same Arael in ep 22 only eva attacked but it's still invalid because it was only one deployed when attack started Getting attacked by Eva-01 in ep 24 - doesn't really count as it was possessed by Kaworu anyway. Even if we ignore this it was only eva around to be possessed so... invalid ******************' I think this establishes that no eva is abnormally prone to get attacked in comparison to others. So yeah

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 24, 2009 1:11 pm Irregardless, Angels attempt to infect Unit 00 and/or whatever Rei is piloting the most often. I'm of the camp that this is merely coincidence though, or done by the storyboard for the sake of always getting Rei hurt because cripple girls are moe or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Aug 24, 2009 2:33 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Irregardless, Angels attempt to infect Unit 00 and/or whatever Rei is piloting the most often. I'm of the camp that this is merely coincidence though, or done by the storyboard for the sake of always getting Rei hurt because cripple girls are moe or something.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Aug 25, 2009 2:37 pm while NGE and especially Rei is heavily responsible for spawning the ever disgusting moe phenomenom NGE itself is pre-moe work so that "explanatioN" goes straight out of the window.
